name: tus_15s
description: TikTok UGC Studio recipe — 15 seconds, 2 parts ส่วนละ 1 video concat

scenes.name: Hook
scenes.content: เปิดมาด้วยปัญหา → เจอสินค้า solve
scenes.prompt: Person noticing the problem, then discovering the product solution, excited expression, holding product up, authentic reaction, problem-to-solution transition

scenes.name: Problem
scenes.content: พูดถึงปัญหาเฉพาะ เจาะจง
scenes.prompt: Person showing concern about the specific problem, natural lighting, authentic emotion, product visible, relatable expression

scenes.name: Discovery
scenes.content: เจอสินค้านี้ solve ปัญหา
scenes.prompt: Person discovering the product, happy surprised expression, holding product naturally, showing packaging, discovery moment

scenes.name: Features
scenes.content: โชว์ texture + ใช้จริง + 3 benefits หลัก
scenes.prompt: Close-up texture demonstration, product in use, showing key benefits, hands applying product, detailed view, professional demonstration

scenes.name: Transformation
scenes.content: Before-After แสดงผลลัพธ์
scenes.prompt: Before and after comparison, transformation result, clear improvement visible, satisfying result

scenes.name: CTA
scenes.content: กดตระกร้าเลย + benefit ทิ้งท้าย
scenes.prompt: Product final shot, call to action, pointing to cart, encouraging purchase, final beautiful product shot

target_audience: Thai TikTok users interested in the product category
